sub_task: Verify depth guard enforcement in commander agent

wkr-025-001.task: Check depth lock text in agent

findings.depth_lock_text: Worker Depth Lock section at line 227-236 with exact 4-line block
findings.assessment: Comprehensive - explicit block that must be included verbatim in every worker prompt

findings.prompt_construction_method: Context Capsule JSON object (lines 171-225) with depth_config, depth_budget, constraints. Worker prompts must include verbatim Worker Depth Lock block (lines 229-236).
gaps_identified: No programmatic enforcement - relies on commander following instructions
No post-launch verification that child agents received leaf-node constraint
No explicit capsule shape for workers setting can_launch=false
No circuit breaker to abort worker that attempts task tool anyway

findings.propagation_logic: depth_config.can_launch=true for commanders, can_launch=false in worker telemetry at depth 3
code_locations: tests/depth-guard-lint.sh:31 - forbids can_launch: true in worker agent

findings.depth_tracking_mechanism: depth_config object with current_depth, max_depth, can_launch fields; plus depth_budget with squads_allocated/squads_max
findings.decrement_logic: Depth INCREMENTS down hierarchy: commander depth=1, squad lead depth=2, worker depth=3 with can_launch=false
findings.hierarchy_flow: Launcher -> Commander (depth=1) -> Squad Lead (depth=2) -> Worker (depth=3, can_launch=false)

findings.enforcement_mechanism: Structural lint forbids spawn tools in leaf workers; commander instructions mandate leaf workers with Worker Depth Lock block
findings.error_handling: Commander must mark success only if 50 squad leads/250 workers launched; partial if blocked; failed if no squad leads
findings.bypass_risks: STAMPEDE_METASWARM_NO_GATES override disables local timeouts/circuit breakers/cost ceiling
findings.depth_2_enforcement: No explicit depth=2 leaf-only rule; leaf block applied to workers generally not specifically to depth=2

key_mechanisms: Worker Depth Lock block (4-line verbatim text) required in every worker prompt
depth_config object with current_depth/max_depth/can_launch propagated via Context Capsule
Structural lint (depth-guard-lint.sh) forbids can_launch=true and task tool in stampede-agent
child-agents.jsonl telemetry records depth and can_launch for verification
gaps_found: Enforcement is prompt-only - no runtime guard to abort workers that attempt task tool
No programmatic validation that depth lock was actually injected before launch
No explicit depth=2 leaf-only rule - applies to all workers regardless of depth
STAMPEDE_METASWARM_NO_GATES bypass could disable safety checks
synthesis.recommendation: Add runtime circuit breaker that detects and logs if a leaf worker attempts task tool invocation
